reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 처음에 가격이 비싸서 고민했는데 할인할때 잘 산 것 같아요! 여행갈때 모든 대중교통 이용이 가능하면서 가볍고 반려견이 불편해하지 않는 그런 가방을 찾고 있었는데 여러모로 제 맘에 쏙 들어서 구입하게 됐어요:) 일단 본체와 안쪽 쿠션 색감 조합이 넘 이쁘고 때가 잘 탈 것 같지만 생각보다 때가 덜 타는 소재예요. 뭐 묻으면 물티슈로 가볍게 닦아주면 되는! 쿠션감이 좋고 균형이 잘 잡혀서 예민한 제 반려견도 편안하게 잘 들어가 있고 사이즈도 적당하면서 무엇보다 가볍고 숄더할때 끈을 따로 부착하지 않고 늘리고 줄일 수 있어서 깔끔하고 오히려 전 편하게 느껴져요. 수납할 수 있는 주머니도 많아서 좋고 메쉬망부분도 락슬라이더 기능있는 지퍼로 되어 있어서 안심되어요! 아직까지는 넘넘 만족스럽게 잘 사용 중이예요:)
reviews.content_en: I was hesitant at first because of the price, but I think I made a great purchase during the sale! I was looking for a bag that works with all public transportation when traveling, is lightweight, and doesn't make my dog uncomfortable. This bag checked all the boxes for me :) First of all, the color combination of the main body and inner cushioning is so pretty, and while it looks like it might stain easily, the material actually resists stains better than expected. Just wipe it with a wet tissue if anything gets on it! The cushioning feels great and is well-balanced, so even my sensitive pup gets in comfortably and settles in. The size is just right, and most importantly, it's lightweight. The shoulder straps are adjustable without needing separate attachments, which feels clean and convenient for me. There are plenty of storage pockets, and the mesh section has a locking zipper, so I feel secure! I'm still very satisfied with how I'm using it :)

reviews.name: 백****
reviews.content:
2살이 되어서야 처음으로 구매한 이동가방 에쎕떱...🤍 엄마마음에도 강아지 마음에도 쏙 든 가방이예요 !!! 깔끔한 디자인에 수납도 좋아 마롱백 꼭 갖고 싶었는데.. 블랙이라니 때 탈 걱정도 없고 체크 포인트까지 너무 예뻐요! 

몸무게가 3.6kg 이고 등길이 29cm 인 말티푸 아이예용
편하게 누워있기도 하고 메쉬망 닫았을 때도 얼굴 빼꼼 내밀고 잘 엎드려 있네요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
At age 2, I finally purchased a travel carrier, SSFW 🤍 It's a bag that both mom and my pup absolutely love!!! I wanted a clean design with good storage—basically a Marong Bag—and since it's black, I don't have to worry about stains. The checkered accents are so pretty too!

My Maltipoo weighs 3.6kg and has a back length of 29cm.
He lies down comfortably, and even when the mesh is closed, he pokes his face out and lounges well hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송빠르고 좋아요
견고하고 컬러감이 예뻐요
reviews.content_en: Fast shipping and great! The build is sturdy and the color is beautiful.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 민트색 사거 싶었는데 품절이라 고민하다가 블랙으로 샀는데 대만족!! 사실 안에 체크 무늬가 마음에 안들었느데 상품받아보니 괜한 생각한거 같네요 참에 생각보다 부풀지않아서 엥 했는데 시간지나니 빵빵해지고 무엇보다 강아지가 좋아하니 저도 좋네염 실물이 더 예빠얌 할인할때 잘 산거같아욤
reviews.content_en: I wanted the mint color but it was sold out, so I hesitated and got the black instead—totally satisfied!! Honestly, I was worried about the plaid pattern inside at first, but when I received it, I realized I was being silly. I was surprised it didn't puff up at first, but after some time it filled out nicely. Most importantly, my dog loves it, so I love it too! The actual product is even prettier than expected. I'm glad I bought it on sale!

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 예쁩니다 진짜 진짜 대박 예쁘구요 폭신하니 저희 테디 너무 마음에 들어 하더라구요ㅜㅜ 최고에요 블랙이랑 휘뚜루 마뚜루 들기도 좋구요! 완전 가벼워요!! 정착합니다...❤️
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty! Seriously, seriously amazing design, and my Teddy loves how soft and fluffy it is ㅜㅜ It's the best! It's easy to carry with the black and everything, and it's completely lightweight!! I'm keeping it... ❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 사이즈가 넘 커서 무거울까 걱정했지만, 가볍고 예뻐서 넘 맘에 들었습니다. 무엇보다 울 강아지가 편하게 누워서 즐길 수 있는 점이 가장 만족스럽습니다.
reviews.content_en: I was worried the size would be bigger than expected and maybe heavy, but it's lightweight and beautiful, so I'm really happy with it. Most importantly, I'm most satisfied that my pup can lie down comfortably and enjoy it.

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 3kg 미니비숑 입니다 편한지 알아서 들어가서 누워있어요 가방 자체도 가볍고 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: I have a 3kg Mini Bichon. He figured out it was comfortable and goes in on his own to lie down. The bag itself is lightweight and nice.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
정말 너무 만족해요 ◡̈ 
두 마리라 하나 사고 만족해서 다른거 고민하다 동일한거 샀는데 좀만 늦게 살걸 그랬나봐요 신상 색감이🥹
reviews.content_en: I'm really so satisfied ◡̈ Since I have two dogs, I bought one and was so happy that I bought another identical one. I wish I'd bought it just a bit later to see the new colors 🥹

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content:
예전부터 사고 싶던 가방인데, 가격 때문에 고민하던 찰나에  할인쿠폰으로 좋은 가격에 잘 산거  같아요..!

그동안 이동가방을 몇개 실패했어서 이번에도 안 둘어가면 어쩌나, 훈련을 어떻게 시켜볼까 고민하고 있었는데 강아지 혼자서 쏙 들어가서 턱 괴고 눕는거 보고 너무 감동적이었습니다ㅜㅠ

바닥 처짐 물론 없고, 쿠션이 폭신폭신하면서도 딱딱하지도, 흐물거리지도 않아서 좋아요

다른걸 다 떠나서 강아지가 써주는 것만으로도 너무너무 만족입니당🐶🐶

3kg, 등길이 27cm 강아지가 쓰기에 사이즈도 아주 적절합니다
reviews.content_en: This is a bag I've wanted for a long time, and I was hesitant because of the price, but I think I got a great deal with the discount coupon! Since I've had several failed attempts with travel carriers before, I was worried about whether he'd even go in, and how I'd train him. But when I saw my pup just hop right in on his own and lie down resting his chin on the edge, I was so touched ㅜㅠ The bottom doesn't sag at all, and the cushioning is fluffy but not too soft or floppy—just right! Beyond everything else, I'm so so satisfied just because my pup actually uses it 🐶🐶 For a 3kg dog with a 27cm back length, the size is very appropriate.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
악~ 구입하고나니 만우절쿠폰이라니ㅋ 그래도 주말 잘사용했숩니다ㅋㅋ
원체 블랙매니아라 전부터 고민했눈데 망사가 답답할거같아 고민하던차 망사가 리뉴얼되었다는 소식에 낼름 구입했어요~ㅎㅎ 저도 요렇게 크로스스트랩이 붙어있눈게 편하드라구요. 그냥 숄더로만 맬일은 거의 없어서요. 가방이 원체 폭신해서인지 크로스로 매면 애얼굴이좀 많이 찌그러지긴 하눈데ㅋㅋ 대중교통이용후 답답할까봐 얼른 열어줫눈데도 안나오는거봄 편한가봐용ㅋㅋ

한가지 아쉬운점이라하면 첫번째 똑단추가 전체닫음하면 얼굴가운데를 따악 가리네요;;; 에코..
헌데 또 망사가 탄탄해서 쟈철내리면서 망사를 위로살짝 빼꼼 올려주기 편하네요.ㅋㅋ
그리고 또하나 포켓이 다 오픈되어있어서 사용하기눈 참편하고 좋더라구요.
헌데 포켓에 간식봉투는 못넣겠어요. 식탐많은 저희 댕댕이 얼굴이 자꾸 글로 들어가려고 하네요 ㅋㅋ
하나정도는 지퍼포켓이었음하는 아쉬움 있습니다~ 헤헤
나중에 또 리뉴얼되면 고민좀 해봐주셨음하눈 바램에 주저리 남겨봅니다~

요즘 뜸했눈데 넘맘에들어서 블로그후기한번 남겨봐야겠어요~
reviews.content_en: Oh! I just realized I could have used an April Fools coupon after buying 😅 But I used it well over the weekend haha I've always been a black fanatic and had been thinking about this for a while, but the mesh seemed like it might feel stuffy. Then I heard the mesh was redesigned, so I jumped on the purchase! I also find the cross strap that's attached convenient. I almost never just use it as a shoulder bag. The bag is so puffy that when I cross it, the pup's face gets a bit squished lol After using public transportation, I quickly opened it because I was worried it might feel stuffy, but seeing that he doesn't come out, it must be comfortable lol One downside is that when fully closed, the first snap covers right down the middle of his face 😭 Eco... But the mesh is sturdy, so it's easy to slide it slightly up while closing the zipper. And another thing—all the pockets are open, which is super convenient. But I can't put snack bags in the pockets because my food-loving pup keeps trying to poke his nose in lol I wish at least one pocket had a zipper 😅 I'm leaving this lengthy review hoping you'll consider these points for future redesigns~ I've been quiet lately, but I'm so in love with this that I should leave a blog review!

reviews.name: 숙****
reviews.content:
사구나서 세일해서 반품하고 다시결재할가 했지만 너무귀찮아서 그냥 세일가격에 하나더샀어요 ㅜㅜ 두개필요한거라
끈조절가능해서 구매한이유중에 하나예요
어깨패드 솜빵빵해서 조아요
요새가방은 다들 튼튼하게만들어서
나한테 실용성을 생각해서 고른거라
넘 만족합니다
1. 푹신푹신해서 아기한테 편한거
2. 끈조절가능해서 크로스로 맬수있다는거
3.때가 안타는 블랙색상이 있다는거

진짜 아가들가방 여러개있는데 어떤건 무겁고
어떤건 힘이업고 가방실패 너무마니했는데
정착입니다

푹신푹신하고 탄탄
reviews.content_en: I bought it and then a sale happened, so I thought about returning and repurchasing, but it was too much hassle so I just bought another one at the sale price 😭 I needed two anyway. The adjustable straps were one of the reasons I bought it. I love how the shoulder pads are nice and puffy. Modern bags are all built sturdy, so I chose this one thinking about practicality, and I'm really satisfied. 1. It's fluffy so it's comfortable for baby. 2. The adjustable straps mean I can wear it cross-body. 3. The black color doesn't show dirt. I had many failed attempts with pet carrier bags—some were heavy, some weren't supportive enough—but this is the one. Fluffy yet sturdy.

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 5kg 등길이36cm 아이이구요. 저는 156에 45키로 입니다. 2사이즈인데도 생각보다 맸을때 가방이 많이 안커보여서 좋았고 바닥 진짜 튼튼해서 무너짐이 없어요. 안쪽끈은 최대한짧게, 바깥쪽끈은 최대한길게 해서 엑스자로 매면 거의 기울어짐 없이 맬 수 있어요. 워낙 예민하고 이런거 생전 안해봐서 그런지 편하게 엎드려있진 못하지만 움직이지도 않고 잘있네요. 한10분매고 돌아다녀봤는데.. 무겁긴 무거워요..ㅎ 가방자체도 가벼운건 아니라 오래돌아다니긴 어려울꺼같아요. 그치만 저는 차로 왔다갔다하기 편할려고 산거라 괜찮아요. 디자인도 너무 예쁘고 겉에는 살짝 방수 재질이라 때도 잘 안탈 것 같아요. 저도 큰맘먹고 할부로 산건데 비싼값 하네용 고민하지말고 질러버렷
reviews.content_en: My dog is 5kg with a 36cm back length. I'm 156cm and 45kg. Even though it's size 2, the bag doesn't look too big when I wear it, which is great. The bottom is really sturdy with no sagging. I adjust the inside straps as short as possible and the outside straps as long as possible to wear it in an X-formation, so there's barely any tilting. Since my pup is sensitive and has never done this before, she can't lie down comfortably, but she stays still and does well. I wore it and walked around for about 10 minutes and it was definitely heavy... The bag itself isn't light either, so it would be hard to use for long periods. But since I bought it for convenience driving in and out of the car, it's fine. The design is so pretty, and the outside material has a slight water-resistant coating, so it shouldn't stain easily. I made a big decision and paid in installments—it's worth the price! Don't hesitate, just go for it!

reviews.name: 문****
reviews.content:
우와 정말 예뻐요 
더현대서울 위펫 매장 갔다가 실제보고 구매했는데 정말 가볍고 안에 애기가 올라갈 쿠션소재가 너무너무 부드럽고 감촉이 좋아요! 😍 리뉴얼전버전이 어깨끈조절 되서 고민했는데 리뉴얼후 버전이 가볍고 크로스끈도 들어있어서 이걸로하길 너무 잘했어요>.< 그리구 리카리카 쿠션백 블랙도 했는데 , ssfw 크림색이 털붙는것도 안보이고 밖에 엠보도 너무 귀엽습니당 너무 예쁜 우리애기 거의..첫백  예쁘게 잘쓰겟습니다 넘 맘에들어서 후기 아주 길게 남겨용
reviews.content_en: Wow, it's really beautiful! I went to the Lotte World Mall WEPET store, saw it in person, and purchased it. It's really lightweight and the cushion material inside where the baby sits is so soft and feels great! 😍 The previous version had adjustable shoulder straps which made me hesitant, but the new version is lighter and comes with cross straps, so I'm really glad I chose this one >.< Also, I got the RICARICAR cushion bag in black, and the SSFW cream color doesn't show fur sticking to it. The embossing outside is so cute too! My baby's first bag is so pretty—I'll use it beautifully. I'm so in love that I'm leaving a really long review!

reviews.name: 윤****
reviews.content: 강아지 이동가방 선택하기 너무 어려웠어요…브랜드도 많고 실제로 보고 구매하는것도 아니기에 실패도 해봤고요 근데 SSFW토이팟 구매해보고 재질을 강아지가 너무 좋아했고 마론백 상세사진에 생수를 넣고 들어도 쳐짐이 없는 사진을 보고 여기서 마론백을 구매하게 되었어요. 근데 구매할때 마침 세일까지 해서 완전 득템했네요. 전체적으로 다 만족스러운데 한가지 아쉬운점은 아래 내부쿠션 끝쪽에 고정할수 있는게 뭔가 있으면 더 좋았을것 같아요 강아지가 아기강아지라 구런지 그게 계속 밀리더라구요^^ 아무튼 아기강아지 천방지축이라 절대 가만히 있지 않아서 예전다른 가방쓸때 너무 힘들었는데 마론백은 편안한지 저렇게 있는게 신기해서 사진찍었어요 ㅎㅎ 정말 추천합니다
reviews.content_en: Choosing a dog carrier was so difficult… there are so many brands, and since I can't buy in person, I've had failures before. But after trying SSFW Toy Pots, my dog really loved the material, and seeing the detailed photo of the Marong Bag where water bottles could be placed without sagging, I decided to buy the Marong Bag here. And there was a sale going on at the time, so I got an awesome deal! I'm satisfied with everything overall, but one minor thing—it would have been nice if there was something to fix the bottom cushioning at the edge so it doesn't shift. Since my pup is still a puppy, maybe that's why it kept moving around. Anyway, since my puppy is wild and never stays still, it was so hard with my previous bag, but it's amazing that she just stays in the Marong Bag like that, so I took a photo lol I really recommend it!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 열어놓고 사용하기에는 진짜 딱이에요. 가방도 너무 너무 예쁘고 고급지고 탄탄하고 소재도 좋아요. 근데 대중교통 이용시에는 아이가 너무 딱 맞아서 불편할 것 같아요ㅜㅜ몸무게3.3kg, 등길이 28cm로, 상세설명보고 산건데 조금만 더 여유있었으면 좋았을 것 같아요. 이 외에는 다 만족스러워요!
reviews.content_en: It's really perfect for using with the bag open. The bag is so so pretty, luxurious, sturdy, and the material is nice. But for public transportation, it seems like it would be uncomfortable because my pup would fit too snugly 😢 My dog weighs 3.3kg with a 28cm back length, and I bought it based on the detailed description, but I wish it had a bit more room. Other than that, I'm satisfied with everything!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 4kg 말티푸인데 딱 맞아요! 저희집 강아지가 실머파티푸들이라 검정색이 넘 잘어울리네용ㅎㅎ 수납공간도 넉넉히고 밑으로 처지지도 않고 턱 받치는 쿠션도 폭신해요! 매쉬망은 사용하지 않을때 정리 할 수도 있게 만들어져서 비싼 가방 값 하는거 같아요 체고🥰❤️
reviews.content_en: My 4kg Maltipoo fits perfectly! Since my pup is a real Toy Poodle, black looks so good on her hehe There's plenty of storage space, no sagging at the bottom, and the chin-rest cushion is fluffy! The mesh can be organized when not in use, so the expensive bag price is worth it! Top tier 🥰❤️

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
3.7~3.9kg/ 등길이29 말티즈입니다!
장점부터 말씀드리면 가방바닥은 단단해서 강아지가 서있어도 괜찮더라구요. 또 가방자체가 푹신해서 강아지가 집에서도 자주 들어가 앉아있어서 좋구요. 디자인이 이뻐서 좋아요.
단점이, 가방 바닥쿠션이 세로로 길어 발이 양쪽으로 빠지고 나중에 집와서 보면 쿠션이 한쪽으로 쏠려있어요. + 가방 앞쪽 턱이 낮아서 신명날때 발광하는 우리집 강아쥐같은 친구들은 앞으로 떨어질수있어요ㅜ 참고하세요!
아 가방은 딱맞게사서 닫히긴하지만 왠만하면 안닫고 씁니다. (대중교통은 다른가방으로)
금액이 금액인지라 아쉬운부분이 더 보이긴합니다.
reviews.content_en: I'm a 3.7~3.9kg Maltese with a 29cm back length! Pros: The bag bottom is sturdy so my pup can stand comfortably. Also, since the bag itself is fluffy, my pup often goes in and sits even at home, which is great. The design is pretty. Cons: The bag bottom cushion is long vertically, so the paws slip out to the sides, and when I get home the cushion is shifted to one side. + The front edge of the bag is low, so excitable pups like mine can fall out the front when they're wild 😢 Keep that in mind! Oh, the bag fits just right and closes, but I usually keep it open (I use a different bag for public transportation). Since the price is what it is, the shortcomings stand out more.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
지퍼가 락지퍼로 개선되었고 블랙이라 예뻐서 구입했어요. 가방 가볍고 폭신하니 좋아요. 오늘 매고 산책하고 동반식당도 갔었는데 대만족입니다~
2.8키로, 등길이25예요~
reviews.content_en: The zipper was improved to a locking zipper and it's black so it's pretty, so I bought it. The bag is lightweight and fluffy, which is nice. I wore it today and went for a walk and even visited a pet-friendly restaurant—totally satisfied! My pup weighs 2.8kg with a 25cm back length~

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
어제 주문했는데 다음날 빠르게 잘 도착 했습니다.
한달이 넘게 고민하고 검색하고 펫페어도 가 보고 했으나 마음에 드는 걸 찾지 못하다
주문한만큼 아주 마음에 들어요.
모두 예뻐서 고민했으나 가장 기본으로 했고요.
무얼 선택하든 다 만족할만큼 예쁘고 안정감도 있어 만족합니다.
처음 구입해 보는거라 여러번 문의 드렸는데 너무 친절히 빠루 답변해 주셔서
감사했습니다.
reviews.content_en: I ordered yesterday and it arrived quickly the next day. I spent over a month thinking, searching, and even went to a pet fair, but couldn't find anything I liked. Now that I've ordered, I'm really happy with it. I couldn't decide because they're all pretty, but I went with the most basic color. Whatever you choose, everything is pretty and stable enough to be satisfied with. Since this is my first purchase, I asked questions several times, and the customer service was so kind and quick to respond—thank you!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 6키로 비숑 키우는데 사이즈 딱 좋아요 가방도 가볍고 어깨도 안아파서 들고다니기 넘 편합니다 저희 강아지도 가방만 꺼내면 들어가겠다고 난리난리에요 엄청 푹신하고 주머니도 많고 디자인 진짜 귀여워서 들고 다닐 맛이 나요 완젼 굿 👍 아 배송도 엄청 빨리왔어요 감사함미당
reviews.content_en: I have a 6kg Bichon and the size is perfect! The bag is lightweight and doesn't hurt my shoulders, so it's so convenient to carry around. As soon as my pup sees the bag come out, he wants to get in—he goes crazy! It's super fluffy, has lots of pockets, and the design is really cute, so it's fun to carry around. Completely awesome 👍 Oh, and the shipping was incredibly fast too—thank you!

reviews.name: 다****
reviews.content:
민트랑 고민하다 블랙으로 햇는데
넘예🖤 가방 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 
편한지 강아지가 바로 쏘옥 들어가서 눕네용ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I was thinking between mint and black, and I went with black. So pretty 🖤 The bag design is so cute and my pup just pops right in and lies down hehe

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
연휴가 있었지만 배송빠르고 잘 받았습니다.
디자인 깔끔하고 아이도 좋아합니다.
reviews.content_en: Even with the holidays, shipping was fast and I received it well. The design is clean and my pup likes it too.

reviews.name: 혼****
reviews.content:
생각했던 것보다 사이즈가 덜 넉넉해서 아쉽긴 하지만 저희애가 큰게 잘못인걸루😂
디자인 사진이랑 같아요 ㅎㅎ 이쁘네용
후기가 없어서 엄청 고민하다가 샀는데 맘에 들어요!
다만 아쉬운점은 락슬라이더가 아니라는 점 ㅠㅠ 
크게 신경쓰일 정도는 아니지만 가격이 가격인만큼 그부분이 조금 아쉽더라구요!

아이가 다른 가방은 들어가기도 싫어했는데 요건 쏙 들어가서 편하게 엎드리는거 보고 놀랐어요 ㅎㅎ
바닥 처짐 없고, 소재도 생활 방수되고 ㅎㅎ
어깨패드도 편안합니다!
따로 크로스끈 필요없이 길이조절로 맬수있어서 좋아요
세로 길이도 넉넉해서 편하게 잘 있구요
더스트백이 있어서 때 안타게 잘 보관할 수 있겠어요!
reviews.content_en: The size is less spacious than I expected, but that's my fault for having a bigger pup 😂 The design matches the photo hehe It's pretty! I was really hesitant because there were no reviews before buying, but I like it! The only downside is that it doesn't have a locking zipper 😔 It's not something that bothers me much, but given the price, that part is a little disappointing. My pup didn't want to get in other bags, but this one—I was shocked to see him just go right in and lie down comfortably hehe No sagging at the bottom, water-resistant material, and comfortable shoulder pads! You can adjust the length without needing a separate cross strap, which is nice. The vertical length is roomy too, so he's comfortable. It comes with a dust bag so I can keep it clean and prevent staining! Looking forward to using it!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 가볍고 아이가 편안해 해요 그리고 재질도 너무 좋네요~^^
reviews.content_en: It's lightweight and my pup is comfortable in it. The material is really nice too~ ^^

reviews.name: 숙****
reviews.content:
사자마자 세일해서 열받앗지만  급해서 그냥 또 샀어요 
고민하다 산건데 정말이쁘고 잘산거같아요

끈조절되고 주머니많고
무엇보다 가벼워요
reviews.content_en: Right after I bought it, it went on sale—so annoyed! But I needed it urgently so I just bought another one anyway. I was hesitant before buying, but it's really pretty and seems like a great purchase! The straps are adjustable, there are lots of pockets, and most of all it's lightweight!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
배송이 빨라서 좋았어요
상품도 이쁘고 품질도 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast, which was great! The product is pretty and good quality.

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 사고싶었던 제품인데 바잇미 특별 할인 기간에 장만했어요 박스형이라 편한지 강아지가 잘 들어가네요 가방은 가볍고 튼튼합니다
reviews.content_en: I wanted this product and got it during the BITE ME special discount period! Since it's a box shape, my pup goes in easily. The bag is lightweight and sturdy.

reviews.name: 혀****
reviews.content:
작성된 리뷰에 단점이 보이지 않아서 
그래도 튼튼하겠다 싶어 나름 꼼꼼히 검색해보고 정착한 가방입니다!!

장점은 많은듯 했지만, 저희 애들이 사용할땐 가방 무너짐이 좀 있었습니다!
그리구 여자가 들기에는 어떠한 좋은 가방도 무거울수밖에 없다는 사실을 알게해준 가방입니다 ㅠㅠㅠ 
그만큼 가방은 가벼운편인듯하나, 저희 애가 무게가 좀 나가면 여자가 들기엔 무겁습니당 ㅠ

그리고 색상은 블랙이라 털이 많이 붙습니다
털이 안붙을수가 없어요 ~~~~ 🥲
reviews.content_en: I didn't see any downsides in the written reviews, so I thought it must be sturdy and carefully researched before settling on this bag!! There were many advantages, but when my pups used it, the bag did sag a bit! Also, this bag taught me that no matter how good the bag, it's heavy to carry as a woman 😔 So the bag itself seems lightweight for sure, but if my pup weighs a lot, it's heavy for a woman to carry 😢 And since the color is black, fur sticks to it a lot. It's impossible for fur not to stick ~~~~ 🥲

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 너무 편하고 예뻐요! 강아지가 이동가방을 엄청 좋아하는데 마롱백도 머무너무 좋아하네요
reviews.content_en: It's so comfortable and pretty! My dog really loves travel carriers, and she loves the Marong Bag so much too!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content:
배송도 빠르고 가방도 폭닥폭닥 너무 예뻐요
그리고 무엇보다 바닥처짐이 1도 없어요👍
reviews.content_en: Shipping was fast and the bag is so fluffy and so pretty! And most of all, there's zero sagging at the bottom 👍

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content: 디자인도 예쁘고 강아지가 너무 편안해해요
reviews.content_en: The design is pretty and my dog is so comfortable in it

reviews.name: 남****
reviews.content: 3.4 말티푸에요 사이즈는 넉넉하고 살짝 큰 느낌도 있어서 속에 쿠션이나 이불 하나 더 깔아주면 딱 맞아요 ㅎㅎ 일단 밑 쳐짐이 없어서 들었을때 아이가 편안해하고 또 폭신폭신해서 가방 열자마자 안에 들어가서 쉬네요 ㅎㅎ 디자인도 넘넘 예쁩니다!
reviews.content_en: 3.4kg Maltipoo. The size is spacious and feels a bit big, so adding an extra cushion or blanket inside fits perfectly haha. First of all, there's no sagging on the bottom, so when I carry it my pup feels comfortable, and it's so fluffy that she goes right in to rest as soon as I open the bag haha. The design is absolutely gorgeous!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
너무너무이뻐요~
아이가쏙들어가서안나온다는..ㅋㅋ
오래오래잘쓸수있을꺼같아요~^^
reviews.content_en:
It's so so pretty~
My pup fits right in and won't come out..lol
I think we'll be able to use it for a long time~^^

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 이뻐요.  편하게 잘이용하고 있어요.
reviews.content_en: It's pretty. I'm using it comfortably.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 디자인 깔끔하고 좋아요
reviews.content_en: The design is clean and nice

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
크림색 넘 이뻐용 ~
4.7키로 등길ㅇ이 33cm 입니뎌
reviews.content_en:
The cream color is so pretty~
My pup is 4.7kg with a back length of 33cm

reviews.name: c****
reviews.content:
마카롱같은 귀엽고 예쁜 마론백.
저희집아가가 편하고 좋은지 가방에만 들어가면 쌔근쌔근 자요~
외출시 은근히 챙길거많은데 주머니도 많아서 너무유용해요~
가방이 예쁘니 사진이 더 살아나는 느낌?
reviews.content_en:
A cute and pretty macaroon-like marron bag.
My baby finds it so comfortable and cozy that she falls asleep as soon as she gets in the bag~
There's actually quite a bit to carry when going out, but with so many pockets it's super useful~
Since the bag is pretty, photos come out even better looking?

reviews.name: 띠****
reviews.content: 검정색이라 무난하게 들고다니기 좋아요
reviews.content_en: Black is convenient to carry around without any worries

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content: 다룬가방은 절대 안들어가는데 이 가방은 쏙 들어가서 안나오네요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: My other bags, my pup won't go in, but this one she slides right in and won't come out lol

reviews.name: B****
reviews.content: 우리 강아지가 너무 좋아해요. 정말 푹신푹신해요.
reviews.content_en: My dog loves it so much. It's really super fluffy.

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 가방 가볍고 디자인도 예뻐요 무너짐도 없어서 좋구요 파스텔톤의 가방들이 예쁘긴 하지만 오염될 걱정 때문에 막 쓰기 조금 그런데 색상이 블랙이라 좋고 블랙 색상인데도 너무 깔끔하고 시크한 매력의 가방입니다.
reviews.content_en: The bag is light and the design is pretty. It doesn't collapse either, which is great. The pastel-colored bags are pretty but I was worried about staining, so I'm glad the color is black. Even though it's black, the bag has such a clean and chic appeal.

reviews.name: 상****
reviews.content: 진짜,,,너무 가볍고, 검정색이라서 ootd 착붙인 가방이에요ㅠㅠ 강아지도 너무 편안해서 가방에 들어가려고 난리를 치는 그런 진짜,, 너무 좋은 제품,,
reviews.content_en: Seriously,,,it's so light and the black color makes it perfect for any outfit😭 My dog is so comfortable that she's dying to get in the bag, honestly,, such an amazing product,,

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 깔끔하고 사람 패딩 소재 같아서 오염에 강해요 사이즈 조금만 작게 나오면 더 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: It's clean and the material is like human padding, so it's resistant to stains. I think it would be even better if the size came a bit smaller!

reviews.name: R****
reviews.content:
어께끈 길이가 조절이 되는게 제일 큰 강점인거 같아요
옆면이 딱딱허지
reviews.content_en: The adjustable shoulder strap length seems like the biggest advantage. The side panels are a bit stiff though

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 지인이 구매한 마롱백에 너무 잘 들어가서 바로 구매했어요 ~ 역시나 너무 좋아해요
reviews.content_en: A friend bought the marron bag and my pup fit in so well that I bought it right away ~ I love it just as much!

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 블랙 에디션 보자마자 반해서 바로 구매했어요. 확실히 블랙이 시크한 매력이 있는 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en: As soon as I saw the Black Edition, I fell in love and bought it right away. The black definitely has a sleek charm to it!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 울 강아지가 넘 좋아합니다 최애 가방🤎
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much. My favorite bag🤎

reviews.name: Y****
reviews.content: 이쁘고 고급스러운 백이에요^^
reviews.content_en: It's pretty and a luxurious bag^^
